title: Inception
plot: A thief who steals secrets through dream-sharing technology is offered a chance at redemption — if he can plant an idea instead of stealing one.

title: The Princess Bride
plot: A farmhand-turned-pirate must rescue his true love from an odious prince, with sword fights, giants, and plenty of wit along the way.

title: Spirited Away
plot: A young girl wanders into a world ruled by gods and spirits, where she must work in a bathhouse to free herself and her parents.

title: The Silence of the Lambs
plot: A young FBI trainee seeks the help of an imprisoned cannibal killer to catch another serial killer who skins his victims.

title: The Grand Budapest Hotel
plot: The adventures of a legendary concierge and his protégé at a famous European hotel between the wars.

title: Interstellar
plot: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival.

title: Get Out
plot: A young Black man visits his white girlfriend's family estate, where unsettling discoveries reveal a horrifying secret.

title: La La Land
plot: An aspiring actress and a jazz musician fall in love while pursuing their dreams in Los Angeles.

title: The Shawshank Redemption
plot: Two imprisoned men bond over years, finding solace and eventual redemption through acts of common decency.

title: Mad Max: Fury Road
plot: In a post-apocalyptic wasteland, a woman rebels against a tyrannical ruler with the help of a drifter named Max.

title: Parasite
plot: Greed and class discrimination threaten the newly formed symbiotic relationship between the wealthy Park family and the destitute Kim clan.

title: Paddington 2
plot: Paddington looks for the perfect present for his aunt's birthday, but a thief frames him and he must clear his name.

title: Hereditary
plot: A grieving family is haunted by tragic and disturbing occurrences after the death of their secretive grandmother.

title: Before Sunrise
plot: A young man and woman meet on a train in Europe and spend one evening together in Vienna, knowing it may be their only night.

title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring
plot: A meek Hobbit and eight companions set out on a journey to destroy the powerful One Ring and save Middle-earth.

title: Free Solo
plot: Follow rock climber Alex Honnold as he attempts to conquer the first free solo climb of El Capitan's 3,000-foot vertical rock face.

title: Knives Out
plot: A detective investigates the death of a patriarch of an eccentric, combative family during a gathering at their estate.

title: Whiplash
plot: A promising young drummer enrolls at a cut-throat music conservatory where his dreams are mentored by an instructor who will stop at nothing.
